sourceContext.originPage: Points Forts article detail page (video-led article)

suitableFor: article pages that embed an external video (Kaltura, YouTube, Vimeo)
video-led 'stage' at the top of an article with a poster image and play overlay
any single external video embed by URL with optional poster
notSuitableFor: self-hosted video files (use the Video block)
image galleries or multiple rotating videos (use a carousel)
social-post-only embeds without a poster (still works, but poster click-to-load is the intended UX here)
